prompt: Tap sb as the position anchor before acting.
why_v1: Position anchors keep action order clear before a track-specific action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The small blind is the right seat anchor, so the cue read stays tied to the out-of-position seat that has to survive the pressure first.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The small blind is the right position anchor because deep tournament pressure changes with who is forced to defend and who can threaten survival.
